title: Another Better Minecraft Modpack
description: A modpack focused on adding more things that lean to the vanilla side of minecraft
body:
This minecraft modpack is somewhat like the others but some diffrences.

Expect to find mamy diffrent villages in many intresting palces of diffrent sizes.Many weapons could also be found with an abondunce of enchantments joining them.\
![Guns could be used and could be used by hostile mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f430eda4b669cd49afd3b90f7215584a84dc799d.png)

Weather events are more of a threat now as the can be found in the nether now and could lead to challenges when traversing the nether

There are a varaity of new features that have been added but I would be here forever listing them one by one, likme new dimensions, more structures, renewed end dimennsion, weapons, mobs, bosses, biomes, quality of life, small features, and etc.

NOTICE:The immersive music mod will only work in the overworld and nether dimension any other will make the game crash (it has been left disabled and not removed because its been modified to work with modded biomes)
